headlines.headline: Krevan Investments announces breakthrough in wireless connectivity

sentiment.reasoning: A breakthrough in wireless connectivity suggests potential for new product development and competitive advantage.

headlines.headline: Krevan Investments announces breakthrough in process automation

sentiment.reasoning: Process automation breakthroughs typically lead to immediate operational efficiency gains and margin expansion.

sentiment.reasoning: Annual sustainability reports are standard corporate disclosures and rarely impact financial performance directly.

headlines.headline: Krevan Investments announces $7.9B share buyback program

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
